SessionStart.command: bash -lc 'for root in "${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "~/AppData/Roaming/Code/agentPlugins/github.com/github/copilot-plugins/plugins"; do if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/scripts/hooks/run-with-flags.js" ]; then printf "%s" "$input" | node "$root/scripts/hooks/run-with-flags.js" "session:start" "scripts/hooks/session-start.js" "minimal,standard,strict"; exit $?; fi; done'
